title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (e), UNDER (17) CEBU, SUBSECTIONf, AND ITEM TEN, UNDER CEBU, SUBSECTIONg, SECTION TWO   OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED AND THIRTEEN.

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1976, June 22, 1957 ]
